quality.rationale: 经典相对论流体运动学分解，需多步指标运算与投影张量正交性推导；题干完整但解答文本截断。

origin.question:
[文件 1: 1_s5_5.18.md]

Problem 5.18. If $\mathbf{u}$ is the 4-velocity of a fluid show that $
abla \mathbf{u}$ can be decomposed as
$$
\mathsf {u}_{\alpha ;  eta} = \omega_{\alpha  eta} + \sigma_{\alpha  eta} +  rac {1}{3} 	heta \mathsf {P}_{\alpha  eta} - \mathsf {a}_{\alpha} \mathsf {u}_{ eta},
$$
where $\mathbf{a}$ is the "4-acceleration" of the fluid
$$
\mathbf {a}_{\alpha} \equiv \mathbf {u}_{\alpha ;  eta} \mathbf {u}^{ eta} ,
$$
$	heta$ is the "expansion" of the fluid world lines
$$
\theta \equiv 
abla \cdot \mathbf {u} = \mathrm {u}_{; \alpha}^{\alpha},
$$
$\omega_{\alpha  eta}$ is the “rotation 2-form” of the fluid, and $\sigma_{\alpha  eta}$ is the “shear tensor”
$$
\omega_{\alpha  eta} \equiv  rac {1}{2} \left(\mathrm {u}_{\alpha ; \mu} \mathrm {P}^{\mu}_{ eta} - \mathrm {u}_{ eta ; \mu} \mathrm {P}^{\mu}_{\alpha}ight),
$$
$$
\sigma_{\alpha}  eta \equiv  rac {1}{2} \left(\mathrm {u}_{\alpha ; \mu} \mathrm {P}^{\mu}_{ eta} + \mathrm {u}_{ eta ; \mu} \mathrm {P}^{\mu}_{\alpha}ight) -  rac {1}{3} 	heta \mathrm {P}_{\alpha}  eta .
$$
Here $\mathbf{P}$ is the projection tensor
$$
\mathbf {P}_{\alpha  eta} \equiv \mathbf {g}_{\alpha  eta} + \mathbf {u}_{\alpha} \mathbf {u}_{ eta}
$$
which projects a vector onto the 3-surface perpendicular to $\mathbf{u}$ .

## Solution

Solution 5.18. When the definitions of $\sigma_{\alpha  eta}$ and $\omega_{\alpha  eta}$ are used, we can see we need only verify
$$
\mathsf {u}_{\alpha ;  eta} = \mathsf {u}_{\alpha ; \mu} \mathbf {P}^{\mu}_{ eta} - \mathsf {a}_{\alpha} \mathsf {u}_{ eta}.
$$
It is straightforward to use the definition of $\mathbf{P}^{\mu}_{ eta}$ to verify this. Instead we follow a more instructive approach of projecting the equation with $\mathbf{u}$ and with $\mathbf{P}$ . Note that请将附件中的题目抽象化为 schema JSON 格式

It is straightforward to use the definition of $\mathbf{P}^{\mu}_{ eta}$ to verify this. Instead we follow a more instructive approach of projecting the equation with $\mathbf{u}$ and with $\mathbf{P}$ . Note that请将附件中的题目抽象化为 schema JSON 格式
